summary: Journey page structural + visual alignment testing PASSED. All 13 test cases verified: background changed from beige to Pipeline's #F7FAFC, signal chips render correctly, RadarStrip and SI compact preview removed, sidebar cards use 18px radius and #e7dfd4 border, CoachWatchCardV2 shows 'Why this matters' label, timeline bubbles render with rounded-2xl, PrimaryHeroCard message preview readable, grid gap-6 and sidebar space-y-4, floating action bar works, no console errors, Pipeline and Login pages show no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPage.js: CSS variable overrides correctly set --cm-text, --cm-text-2, --cm-text-3, --cm-text-4, --cm-border colors while letting --cm-bg inherit from global theme (#F7FAFC)
Signal chips (lines 700-737) correctly render with data-testid='journey-signal-chips' containing last activity, match score, and stage chips
RadarStrip import still exists (line 21) but component is no longer rendered in the page - could be cleaned up
All sidebar cards (coaching-stability, key-contacts, communication-activity, ai-section) use consistent rounded-[18px] and borderColor #e7dfd4
CoachWatchCardV2.js: 'Why this matters' label correctly shown (line 154) with Sparkles icon
ConversationBubble.js: Feed-style bubbles with rounded-2xl (16px) and warm border colors
PrimaryHeroCard.js: Message preview has improved spacing with rounded-xl container
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page structural alignment complete. Background now uses Pipeline's #F7FAFC instead of beige. Signal chips replace RadarStrip and SI preview. All sidebar cards use Pipeline tokens (18px radius, #e7dfd4 border). No regressions on Pipeline or Login pages.

journey_background_color.details: Background is rgb(247, 250, 252) / #F7FAFC (Pipeline's var(--cm-bg)), not beige #faf8f5

signal_chips_render.details: Signal chips found: 'Last activity · 3d ago', 'Match score: 71', 'Campus visit'

sidebar_cards_styling.details: All 4 sidebar cards (coaching-stability, key-contacts, communication-activity, ai-section) have 18px border-radius and rgb(231, 223, 212) border (#e7dfd4)

coach_watch_v2_why_this_matters.details: CoachWatchCardV2 found with 'Why this matters' label visible

timeline_conversation_bubbles.details: Timeline found with 18 conversation bubbles, rounded-2xl styling (16px border-radius)

primary_hero_card.details: PrimaryHeroCard renders with improved message preview spacing

grid_layout.details: Grid gap is 24px (gap-6), sidebar uses space-y-4

floating_action_bar.details: Email, Call, Log, Follow-up buttons all visible and clickable

no_console_errors.details: No console errors detected on Journey page

pipeline_no_regression.details: Pipeline page loads correctly with school cards, priority board, navigation

login_no_regression.details: Login page loads correctly with email/password inputs, Sign In button, demo accounts
